---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the DLS AI Chatbot service
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the gap or pain point this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution

What you'd like to see happen. If it touches the personalization system (`systemPrompt.js`), curriculum scope, streaming behavior, or rate limiting, please be specific.

## Affected Area

- [ ] System prompt / personalization
- [ ] `/chat` endpoint
- [ ] `/chat/stream` endpoint
- [ ] Auth / JWT handling
- [ ] Rate limiting
- [ ] Groq model/config
- [ ] Other (specify):

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you preferred this one.

## Additional Context

Mockups, example request/response payloads, or links to related issues.
